---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or report issues in the documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: "documentation"
assignees: ""
---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **This template is for documentation issues only.**
> For bug reports or feature requests, please use the appropriate template.

---

**Remove everything above this line when submitting your documentation issue.**

## 📚 Documentation Issue

Describe the issue or gap in the documentation.

> Example: *The documentation for feature X is unclear because [...]*

---

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

Describe clearly how the documentation can be improved.

> Example: *Add a step-by-step guide for setting up Y.*

---

## 🔗 Relevant Links

Paste any links to the affected documentation pages or related issues.

---

## 📂 Additional Context

Add any additional context or screenshots that may help.

---

*Thank you for helping us improve the documentation!*
